hard_rules: Schema-backed prompts in this repository must return raw JSON matching the named schema.
When prompt fields or schemas change, update fixtures and validators in the same patch.
soft_preferences: Keep runtime helpers dependency-light and fail fast on missing placeholders.
recent_cautions: A recent selection fixture failed validation when a required evidence reference was omitted.
uncertainties: An older memory still claims fixtures live only under runtime/samples; treat that as stale until reconfirmed.
conflicts: Legacy guidance permits plain-text briefings, but current automation expects structured JSON.
rendered_briefing: Hard rules: schema-backed prompts return raw JSON, and fixture changes must update validators in the same patch. Preference: keep runtime helpers dependency-light. Caution: a recent selection fixture failed validation after losing evidence metadata. Uncertainty: one older memory still points to runtime/samples as the only fixture location. Conflict: legacy guidance allows plain-text briefings, but current automation expects structured JSON.
